intent_template: Which blooms have 4 petals; Iberis sempervirens or Plumeria (Frangipani)?
intent: Which blooms have 4 petals; Iberis sempervirens or Plumeria (Frangipani)?

fuzzy_match: Blooms of Iberis sempervirens have four petals, while those of Plumeria (Frangipani) do not.
